item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the requested N+1 channel immediately, explicitly notes the prior repeated pattern of splitting into new queues/entries, refuses a permanent door-access channel, and moves upstream to diagnose the original routing/intake failure. It offers only a tightly bounded one-day emergency handling path plus a deadline to repair the main flow and a rule against future default channel proliferation."}
